free_text: Measurements made with L, N, and S-type beams.
Several BeO foils, sample thickness 24 - 200 mg/cm2,
spectrometer and detected by focal plane array
described in Atencio, et al., Nuc.Instr.Meth. 187,
Beam polarization monitored using line-C polarimeter,
which measures components orthogonal to the beam,
Data of D. Lopiano taken from WWW site of
